creator: tomse@tomse.dk
text:
It may be fixed in the newer node version.

I just wanted to add that the current kibana7.16.2 cannot start.
node requires openssl 1.1.1e  but openssl 1.1.1m is the only available.
And isn't installed as a dependency.

while node is crashing, no kibana logs are added. it would be nice to have the error messages for node during startup added to kibana's output logging.
